passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS
The discount code can be used to purchase up to 4 tickets at 50% off admission.
Please check https://www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets/  for 2025 ferry schedule and the most updated information.
Tickets must be purchased online and are printable.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows up to 4 people at $5.00 off full admission. Children under 5 are admitted for free. Please check their website for hours of operation. 
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text:
THIS IS A COUPON PASS 
Library pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze at the gate with a savings of $10 off per ticket
Children under 2 are free of charge.
NOTICE: Adults must be accompanied by at least one child 12 years or younger when visiting Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze
  https://davisfarmland.com/tickets/

passes.title: Davis Farmland
source_phrases: Redeem this pass for admission to the Discovery Musuem for three (3) people at half price off regular admission. Children under age one are free.
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: THIS IS A RETURNABLE PASS
PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO CARY LIBRARY NO LATER THAN 9 a.m. THE DAY AFTER USE
Pricing: Reduced admission for up to 2 adults at $5 each and 2 children under 12  free.
Tickets for Saturday tours must be purchased in advance.
For more information, please visit Gore Place

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS
Each Library Pass is valid for up to two (2) museum admission tickets at the discounted Library Pass rate of $10 per ticket.
Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films.
The ICA is always free to anyone 18 and under.
 Museum hours and admission are subject to change. 
Current information can be found on the website: https://www.icaboston.org/visit.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
Coupon admits up to 4 people for $5.00 each. Children under 18 are always admitted free. 
 Please check their website for hours of operationand additional details  https://www.gardnermuseum.org/
THIS IS A COUPON PASS
THIS PASS MUST BE PICKED UP IN PERSON FROM CARY LIBRARY

passes.title: Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
source_phrases: THIS IS A COUPON PASS
This one-day Library Partner Admission Pass admits up to 4 people to a Mass Audubon wildlife sanctuary. Admission is discounted to $2 admission per visitor over the age of 2.
Children under 2, admitted free.
Please visit https://www.massaudubon.org/get-outdoors/wildlife-sanctuaries/trails for the latest information
This pass does not need to be returned to the library. Coupon passes may be checked out two weeks before the reserved date for use.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
source_phrases: Pass is valid for a Mass plate passenger vehicle and entitles the bearer to free parking for one vehicle (excluding buses or vans) at Mass State Parks facilities that charge a day-use parking fee.
Pass must be returned in the bag provided the morning after scheduled use.
THIS IS A RETURNABLE PASS
PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO CARY LIBRARY NO LATER THAN OPENING HOURS THE DAY AFTER USE.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass  allows admission for 2 adults at $15 each (general admission and special exhibition) and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each  (special exhibition only). 
There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10.
Children 6 and under are admitted free.
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS
This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS. 
Admission pass will allow a total of six discounted admissions at current rates of:
$20 per adult, ($17 per senior 65+)  $15 per youth (ages 5 to 12) $17 per youth  (ages 13 and up), children ages 4 and under are free
Library pass must be presented at the time of admission.

passes.title: Naismith Memorial Basketball Hall Of Fame
passes.benefit_text:
THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS
This pass allows up to 4 people, 50% off adult and child ticket pricing to the New England Aquarium. 
Children two and under are always ffree
· This is not a ticket.
· Redeem this pass in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
· Review the Aquarium’s website at https://www.neaq.org/visit/  ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
source_phrases: THIS IS A PRINTABLE PASS
This pass allows up to 4 people, 50% off adult and child ticket pricing to the New England Aquarium.
Children two and under are always ffree
· This is not a ticket.
· Redeem this pass in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to 4 people.
· Review the Aquarium’s website at https://www.neaq.org/visit/  ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
· Valid only for Aquarium admission.
· This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets.
· Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold.
· Void if altered or copied. No cash value.
· Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
source_phrases: Pass admits 2 guests at half the price of admission. Children 3 and under are admitted free of charge.
Please check their website for hours of operation.
Pass must be returned in clear pouch provided, by 9AM  the morning after scheduled use.
THIS IS A RETURNABLE PASS
PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO CARY LIBRARY NO LATER THAN OPENING HOURS THE DAY AFTER USE

passes.benefit_text:

Children under age 16 are always admitted FREE.

passes.title: The Trustees Of The Reservations
source_phrases: THIS IS A COUPON PASS
Zoo New England Pass admits 6 people to either Stone Zoo or the Franklin Park Zoo.
With this coupon adult admission is reduced to $9.00 and child admission to $6.00
Children under 2 are free.
Please check the website for hours of operation and closures.
https://www.zoonewengland.org/visit/
